title: [supervisor] Add fleet snapshot and dependency-aware verification planning
objective: Add the safe fleet discipline from `.idea`: require meta fleet snapshots/restore plans before broad repair operations and use scoped `meta exec` includes/tags with dependency-ordered validation plans for repair lanes.
acceptance_criteria: Supervisor runbooks require `rtk meta git status` and a snapshot/restore decision before any broad multi-repo repair operation.
Repair tickets include a narrow reproducer first, then scoped `meta exec --include/--tag` commands, and `--ordered` when dependency order matters.
Snapshot restore instructions are documented for failed broad operations, with evidence capture before rollback.
The verification planner avoids broad expensive checks when targeted checks prove the failure/fix, but escalates to full required gates before merge.

source_gap_audit.reason: Expanded from .handoff/.idea intent after the initial TASK-PRR set proved too broad.
